description: Promoted to Frontend Team Lead within 5 months. Architected modules for Autoclaims.ai and HITPA ERP (60M+ claims), reducing redundancy by 40% and serving as Repository Maintainer.
Modernized legacy Java systems by refactoring raw types and resolving structural vulnerabilities. Adhered to strict enterprise standards with clean, linear Git history.
Focusing on DSA and System Design. Ranked in the top 7% globally on LeetCode (1800+ Rating) with 750+ problems solved. Academic Aggregate: 80.6%.
